sidebar.archiveConfirm: Archive this thread? You can restore it later from Settings.

welcome.title: What can I help you build?
welcome.subtitle: Desktop GUI for Claude Code

chat.placeholder: Ask anything, @ to add files, / for commands

general.sendMessageWithDesc: Choose the key combination to send messages.
general.responseLanguageDesc: Set the language Claude uses to respond. 'Auto' follows your input language.
general.uiLanguageDesc: Choose the language for the user interface.
general.notifyOnCompleteDesc: Show a system notification when a long-running task completes.
general.preventSleepDesc: Keep the system awake while Claude is processing a task.
general.debugModeDesc: Enable DevTools (⌘⌥I / F12), show Debug Logs tab in the bottom panel, and log all Claude CLI communication details for troubleshooting.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.customizeDesc: Customize the look and feel of the application.
appearance.themeDesc: Choose the color theme for the application.
appearance.fontSizeDesc: Font size for the application interface (in pixels).
appearance.fontFamilyDesc: Font family for the application interface.
appearance.chatLayoutDesc: Controls the max width of the chat message area.
appearance.streamingCursorDesc: Choose the style of the streaming cursor animation.
appearance.editorFontSizeDesc: Font size for code blocks, terminal, and diffs (in pixels).
appearance.editorFontFamilyDesc: Monospace font for code blocks, terminal, and diffs.
appearance.showLineNumbersDesc: Display line numbers in code blocks and diffs.

about.title: About Claude Studio
about.description: Desktop GUI for Claude Code CLI

userMenu.scanToPair: Scan with mobile app to pair. Expires in 5 minutes.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.minLength: New password must be at least 6 characters

mcpServers.title: MCP Servers
mcpServers.description: Configure Model Context Protocol servers to extend Claude's capabilities with custom tools.
mcpServers.addServerHint: Add a server to extend Claude with custom tools
mcpServers.name: Name
mcpServers.pasteJsonHint: Supports Claude Code format or simple array format

remoteControl.title: Remote Control
remoteControl.description: Connect your mobile device to control this desktop remotely.
remoteControl.allowRemoteControlDesc: Allow paired mobile devices to control this desktop remotely.
remoteControl.relayConnectionDesc: Connect to the relay server via WebSocket to enable mobile pairing.
remoteControl.signInFirst: Sign in to your account first.
remoteControl.connectionFailed: Failed to connect. Check server URL and login status.
remoteControl.mobilePairingDesc: Scan the QR code with the Claude Studio mobile app to pair. You only need to scan once — the pairing persists across sessions.
remoteControl.lockPasswordDesc: 6-digit password to unlock desktop when remotely controlled.
remoteControl.autoLockDelayDesc: Delay before locking desktop after a mobile device takes control. 0 = immediate.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: Control what Claude is allowed to do on your system.
permissions.permissionModeDesc: Control how Claude handles tool permissions. This sets the default for new sessions.
permissions.bypassPermissions: Bypass permissions — Skip all prompts (⚠️ unsafe)
permissions.plan: Plan mode — Analyze only, no modifications
permissions.allowFileReadDesc: Allow Claude to read files from your project directory.
permissions.allowFileWriteDesc: Allow Claude to create and modify files in your project.
permissions.allowBashDesc: Allow Claude to execute shell commands. Disable for a read-only experience.
permissions.allowMcpDesc: Allow Claude to use tools provided by MCP servers.
permissions.disallowedCommandsDesc: Commands that Claude should never execute, even in full-auto mode.

keybindings.title: Keybindings
keybindings.description: Keyboard shortcuts for common actions. Click a shortcut to change it.
keybindings.reassignHint: Click a shortcut to reassign it. Press {{key}} to cancel.
keybindings.sendMessageGeneral: Send message key is configured in General settings.

archivedThreads.title: Archived Threads
archivedThreads.description: View and restore archived conversation threads.

account.title: Account
account.description: Server connection, account, and settings sync.
account.serverUrlDesc: Backend server for account sync and relay. Leave empty to use default.
account.minLength: New password must be at least 6 characters.
account.settingsSyncDesc: Pull settings from server to sync across devices.
